stocks.impact_theory: Navitas announced a major supply deal with a leading EV manufacturer for GaN power chips, boosting revenue forecasts. Economic implications include accelerated adoption of efficient power tech in EVs and data centers, reducing energy costs. Market psychology: FOMO on AI/EV supply chain plays. Historical parallel: Similar to Nvidia's surge post-CUDA in 2017. Analogies: 1. Like rocket fuel for EV acceleration. 2. GaN chips as the new lithium for power efficiency.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Recent news of partnership and strong Q1 earnings beat, X sentiment highly positive with viral posts on GaN tech revolution (20+ high engagement posts), web searches confirm top gainer status.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy for 20% gain in 1 week on momentum.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if overbought RSI>80, potential 10% pullback.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Competition from Infineon, supply chain disruptions, market rotation from tech.

stocks.justification: Strong news catalyst, high volume surge, consistent top gainer mentions.

stocks.impact_theory: Adobe missed earnings due to slowing AI tool subscriptions amid competition from open-source alternatives. Economic: Highlights saturation in creative software, pressure on SaaS pricing. Psych: Fear of growth slowdown in megacap tech. Parallel: Like Salesforce post-2022 slowdown. Analogies: 1. Crumbling castle under siege. 2. Balloon deflating after hype peak.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings miss reported, X posts criticizing Firefly AI, top loser in S&P500.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Wait for dip buy at $220, potential rebound 10%.

stocks.justification: Clear earnings catalyst, but history of quick recoveries.

stocks.impact_theory: Intuit guidance cut on tax software weakness post-recession fears. Implications: Consumer spending caution hits fintech. Psych: Risk-off in software. Parallel: 2008 financials drop. Analogies: 1. Tax season flu hitting revenue. 2. Iceberg warning for SaaS.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Guidance downgrade, negative X chatter on SMB slowdown.

stocks.impact_theory: Macau gaming revenue miss due to China economic slowdown. Implications: Travel/leisure sector vulnerable to geopolitics. Psych: Risk aversion to cyclicals. Parallel: COVID casino crash 2020. Analogies: 1. Empty casino floor echo. 2. Dominoes falling in Asia recovery hopes.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: China data weak, X sentiment bearish on gaming.

stocks.impact_theory: Nvidia partners with quantum computing firm, expanding beyond GPUs. Implications: Diversifies AI dominance. Psych: Continued AI euphoria. Parallel: Intel's microprocessor era start. Analogies: 1. GPU as oil for AI engine. 2. Bridge to quantum leap.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Quantum news viral on X, analyst upgrades.
